title: dendrobium metrium
intro: Dendrobium metrium, also known as the 'Bai Hua She', is a type of orchid plant that is native to China and is classified as a type of flowering plant in the Orchidaceae family. Traditionally, Dendrobium metrium has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe digestive issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and possessing antioxidant properties. Dendrobium metrium can be prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
